name: Tellstones: King's Gambit
description: Tellstones: King's Gambit is Riot's elegant Demacian bluffing game set in the League of Legends universe — five glyph-engraved bone tiles are slotted into hollows on a slender wooden board and shuffled face-down. Players take turns moving, peeking, swapping, or calling out a tile, racing to a third match-point through equal parts memory and bluff. Beautiful production, ten-minute games, deep mind games.
